title: Luffy’s Grief and the ASL Past
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Sabo, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2 as the scene develops across pages 1–5.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Sabo, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Where is he planning to go?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: A pirate, at his age?! That's ridiculous!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He's in the way of the ceremony!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You there! Get back to shore!!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Huh?!! It can't be... isn't that ....?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: better get out of the way...

summary: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Sabo, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past.
